text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho begins! One of the
so-called "average" runners, Matikanetannhauser,
is a little simpleminded, but easy to get along
with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Narita Brian sees the strength that lies within
her when Matikanetannhauser declares that she
won't lose. Brian responds by resolving to give it
her all as well.
